base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of all_treasures_display — a ui (hud_readout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Full-inventory showcase — all treasure icons displayed in row (boomerang/bomb/bow/candle/flute/meat/potion/letter/magic-book/raft/ladder/bracelet/ring/clock/triforce-pieces). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Full-inventory showcase — all treasure icons displayed in row (boomerang/bomb/bow/candle/flute/meat/potion/letter/magic-book/raft/ladder/bracelet/ring/clock/triforce-pieces); used in attract-mode to showcase inventory
